productDisplayName: Lotto Men Straight Navy Blue Slippers
description: Smart flip flops from lotto for the office-goer. Styled to look formal, these flip flops can be worn with jeans or bermudas. Upper Padded fabric thong style straps with waffle patterned stitch detailing Fabric toe separator for comfort Appliqué d branding on the straps Soft rubber footbed for optimum comfort Diagonal brick patterns and branding on footbed for style Outsole TPU outsole with branding and patterbed lugs for grip and traction Slipper care Rub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
